summary: > **DESIGN + RESEARCH ONLY.** Answers the maintainer's issue-#30 note verbatim: > *"it may be worth spinning up a single database (perhaps postgres?) that can > be used as a shared cache across all workers, rather than this being > something that is used only by a single worker and thus missing cache hits > across workers. I don't know how useful this actually is nor the cost > implications so it is something that needs researching."* > No code applied, no instance launched, no registry write, n
title: XCACHE-SHARED — should the expert cache get a shared database across workers?
